---
name: Integration Request
about: Request a new integration recipe
title: "Integration Request: [System Name]"
labels: integration-request
---

**What system do you want to integrate?**
e.g. Workday, SAP, Okta

**What should happen?**
e.g. When a new AI system is added in Workday, create a use case in Credo AI

**Integration type**
- [ ] Use case creation
- [ ] Model / vendor registry sync
- [ ] GRC / data catalog
- [ ] Evidence sync
- [ ] Other

**Who is this for?**
e.g. HR engineering team, AI governance lead

**How urgent is this?**
- [ ] Blocking a project
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Just exploring

**Any additional context?**
